coreGuidelines: Surgical Precision: Make the smallest possible change that achieves the objective
Single Responsibility: Each commit should address one specific concern
Impact Isolation: Changes should be contained to the affected domain/module
Dependency Preservation: Maintain existing interfaces unless explicitly changing them

businessLogic.validationRequired: Unit tests, integration tests, business rule validation

dataModels.validationRequired: Migration testing, data integrity checks, rollback strategy

infrastructure.validationRequired: Full system testing, performance validation, security audit
